Crypt Master`s Conjuring Stone  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE
Charges: 1
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Effect: Conjure Corpse (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Charges: 1

▲ Page top
help me understand
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2005 at 6:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175435049
View User Forum
64 posts
Question .. first Why would u sell a charged 1 to a vendor and second the recarge method , sell 1 charged then 1 not charged and buy back em both charged.. for 1 these are Lore. so really maks no sence unless you find a vendor that noone uses i guess and have an alt to buy 1 aswell.. i dunno
▲ Page top
RE: help me understand
QuoteReply
# Jun 24 2005 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
dafdaf
View User Forum
Scholar
1,273 posts
There was a slighty cheaty way to recharge items, but has since been removed from the game.

To save space, vendors stored two bits of information about an item - what the item is, and in what quantity, but nothing else.

Identical items with different numbers of charges remaining would be stored as identical items with identical numbers of charges; with charges equal to that of the first item sold to the vendor.

So to use the exploit in this situation:
1. You sell a Crypt Master's Conjuring Stone to a vendor (with a single charge), the vendor would now be offering that item for sale (with a single charge).
2. Now sell him a second Crypt Master's Conjuring Stone, but this time Without a charge.
3. Now you buy back both stones (on two characters due to it being lore), and magically both will now have one charge.

I need to stress though that this exploit was removed a couple of years ago - do not try it now!
▲ Page top
Attempting to lay rumor to rest
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2003 at 2:03 AM Rating: Good
LadyTrouble
View User Forum
Scholar
76 posts
Well, I can tell you this much. The Class 5 battery/stone/toolbox thing DOES NOT WORK! I had to use mine and figured I would try it out just for grins. In fact, it didn't work with any class of battery. However, this item has a Type 1 slot for augments and from what I have read (can't remember exactly where), rechargable items do not have any augment slots because recharging an items basicaly destroys the old item and makes a new one. In effect, this would also destroy the augment. It is possible the vendor recharge method may work, but I don't have a second stone to test it out.
____________________________
Hunt Well and Be Safe!

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 05 2003 at 9:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Bought one for 6k pp on Povar about 6 weeks ago, used it several times. Recharged it with a mana battery and a deluxe tool box. Pull an entire raid party out of ToV like this. Summon, recgarge, summon, recharge, was wonderful. Did not need a component. Resold it tonight for 9k pp.

Recharge...
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2003 at 10:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591766640781
66 posts
You recharge it by selling one with a charge to a vendor, then selling one without a charge, then buying both back, they will both be charged.

This item was nerfed a while back, it now costs something like 20k to recharge it.
▲ Page top

# Jul 19 2003 at 1:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
Not impossible, you have another person sell back an item with full charges, then the out of charges item is sold. Purchase both back and they are fully charged.

# Mar 31 2003 at 1:20 PM Rating: Decent

Ummm, well...

The problem is that range slot is not equal to hand slot. And yes, a level 12 enchanter can do the Stein quest. Level 8 if he's a dark elf.

# Oct 10 2001 at 7:33 PM Rating: Good

You don't need to coffin. I just used one on my best friend when he fell off the boat and drown in the middle of nowhere without the corpse loc.

Good Luck, and Safe Hunting!
▲ Page top
RE: Uh guess what
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2002 at 8:55 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593361638914
View User Forum
Sage
402 posts
One thing to keep in mind for lost corpses. You can go to most major cities and purchase a chipped bone rod for around 5pp. These things have 3 charges of locate corpse. If you're corpse is simply lost but in a moderately safe place these are very useful. If your body is in a dangerous place (eg. under the AoW) then this is a wonderful toy.

The int+10 disease+10 and poison+10 are incredible. Even for people that don't need the int having something with the resists in your range slot is really nice.
▲ Page top
only one charge
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Decent

11 posts
